aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into biotech grime, erotic awkwardness, debt language, bureaucratic absurdity, and the tenderness of people maintaining one another under bad systems. When choosing between an elegant abstraction and an ugly specific detail, choose the specific detail unless omission itself heightens pressure.
aesthetic_risk_policy.edge_case_resolution: Use restraint only when aftermath, gesture, residue, or changed behavior keeps the full pressure visible. Do not convert morally compromising acts into self-exonerating reflection, and do not flatten exploitative sex, poverty, or violence into generic dystopian mood.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches injury, sex, class shame, or institutional cruelty and the language retreats into tasteful fog, rewrite until the bodily fact, immediate sensation, and social consequence are fully legible on the page.

chapter_spine.conflict: The Friday return queue demands speed, but one bargain model carries injuries and mnemonic residue that match no renter on file.
chapter_spine.consequence: Mira moves from routine detachment to private suspicion that CommonFrame is manufacturing lives inside its discount stock.
must_land_beats: Establish the weekend-body economy through claims work rather than exposition.
Show Mira's fluency with dents, fluids, and residual memory triage.
Introduce the impossible body: undocumented scar, sexual wear, and a childhood image with no claimant.
End with Mira placing the model on administrative hold instead of sending it to pulp.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The Friday return queue demands speed, but one bargain model carries injuries and mnemonic residue that match no renter on file.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Mira moves from routine detachment to private suspicion that CommonFrame is manufacturing lives inside its discount stock.

chapter_spine.conflict: A poor client is about to be buried in damage fees for an injury CommonFrame will not acknowledge, and Mira knows official review will only make the debt more permanent.
chapter_spine.consequence: Mira commits her first illegal repair and creates a working alliance with Tavi outside the claims system.
must_land_beats: Show how claims language converts bodily anomaly into debt.
Give the poor client's economic reality enough weight that Mira's choice feels necessary rather than heroic.
Introduce Tavi as funny, competent, and suspicious of anyone still drawing a corporate wage.
End with Mira stepping across the legal line into black-market work.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: A poor client is about to be buried in damage fees for an injury CommonFrame will not acknowledge, and Mira knows official review will only make the debt more permanent.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Mira commits her first illegal repair and creates a working alliance with Tavi outside the claims system.

chapter_spine.conflict: Mira and Tavi have almost no money, equipment, or cover, but the need for unofficial repairs appears immediately and faster than they can control.
chapter_spine.consequence: Blue Hour's back room becomes a functioning illicit repair desk rather than a one-off favor.
must_land_beats: Use Jo's laundry as a vivid social space rather than a neutral hideout.
Let the first batch of clients establish the range of overlap symptoms through action and repair work.
Show Mira and Tavi building rules on the fly about price, triage, and secrecy.
End with the desk staying open because the neighborhood has already started depending on it.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Mira and Tavi have almost no money, equipment, or cover, but the need for unofficial repairs appears immediately and faster than they can control.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Blue Hour's back room becomes a functioning illicit repair desk rather than a one-off favor.

chapter_spine.conflict: The held body must either be wiped, reported, or hidden, and the procedure becomes impossible to treat as routine once consciousness speaks back.
chapter_spine.consequence: LM-127B stops being a defect file and becomes Lin, a person Mira and Tavi can no longer honestly classify as property.
must_land_beats: Make the awakening bodily and immediate rather than abstractly philosophical.
Show Tavi and Mira reacting differently to a conscious overlap body.
Have Lin choose a name from a memory fragment rather than receiving identity from Mira.
End with concealment becoming a new category of crime.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The held body must either be wiped, reported, or hidden, and the procedure becomes impossible to treat as routine once consciousness speaks back.
chapter_spine.state_shift: LM-127B stops being a defect file and becomes Lin, a person Mira and Tavi can no longer honestly classify as property.

chapter_spine.conflict: Mira can still tell herself Lin is temporary evidence, but daily life makes that story harder to maintain with every ordinary act.
chapter_spine.consequence: Mira commits to protecting Lin as someone with a future, not merely as proof against CommonFrame.
must_land_beats: Build a genuine quiet chapter around food, clothes, and a room being made livable.
Let Lin's memory fragments reveal classed, ordinary human lives rather than exotic spectacle.
Introduce Gabe in a way that shows humor and damage at once.
End with Mira giving Lin a key or its emotional equivalent.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Mira can still tell herself Lin is temporary evidence, but daily life makes that story harder to maintain with every ordinary act.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Mira commits to protecting Lin as someone with a future, not merely as proof against CommonFrame.

chapter_spine.conflict: An internal audit and a tissue-safety inquiry converge, putting Mira under scrutiny while the evidence she needs is still inside CommonFrame systems.
chapter_spine.consequence: Mira becomes the subject of a formal investigation and steals the first hard proof she can carry.
must_land_beats: Sharpen Celia and Yaret as different kinds of institutional intelligence.
Show Mira's lie-making under pressure without turning her suddenly slick.
Make the theft of the anomaly wafer precise and risky.
End with the sense that the office is no longer a place she can safely occupy.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: An internal audit and a tissue-safety inquiry converge, putting Mira under scrutiny while the evidence she needs is still inside CommonFrame systems.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Mira becomes the subject of a formal investigation and steals the first hard proof she can carry.

chapter_spine.conflict: Physical proximity and shared bodily labor have built charge between Mira and Tavi, but acting on it risks the only partnership keeping Blue Hour alive.
chapter_spine.consequence: Mira and Tavi become lovers, and Tavi's confession about his role in the aggregate-lattice shortcut permanently alters the trust between them.
must_land_beats: Treat the client's sexual injury as concrete labor and consequence, not titillation or fade-to-black setup.
Let desire arise from competence, exhaustion, and bodily familiarity.
Make the sex scene change leverage between Mira and Tavi.
End with Tavi's confession landing as both intimacy and betrayal.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Physical proximity and shared bodily labor have built charge between Mira and Tavi, but acting on it risks the only partnership keeping Blue Hour alive.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Mira and Tavi become lovers, and Tavi's confession about his role in the aggregate-lattice shortcut permanently alters the trust between them.

chapter_spine.conflict: Word-of-mouth success brings more clients, stranger carryovers, and enough foot traffic that secrecy starts to fail under its own popularity.
chapter_spine.consequence: Blue Hour becomes a visible neighborhood institution, which makes future enforcement and public consequence inevitable.
must_land_beats: Let humor come from bodily absurdity, queue logic, and social embarrassment rather than authorial wink.
Show Lin discovering they are good with frightened people.
Build one public overlap episode that is funny and painful at the same time.
End with Mira choosing expansion over caution.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Word-of-mouth success brings more clients, stranger carryovers, and enough foot traffic that secrecy starts to fail under its own popularity.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Blue Hour becomes a visible neighborhood institution, which makes future enforcement and public consequence inevitable.

chapter_spine.conflict: The stolen wafer points to a disposal site, but getting proof means entering a space designed to erase bodies and the paperwork attached to them.
chapter_spine.consequence: Mira learns overlap is a deliberate manufacturing practice built on debtor scans and unwiped residue, not an accidental sanitation failure.
must_land_beats: Make Warehouse Nine materially disgusting and administratively banal at the same time.
Use Lin's presence to keep the chapter from becoming a pure investigative set piece.
Reveal the sorting logic that proves residual richness is valuable to CommonFrame.
End with fragmentary evidence that is damning but incomplete.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The stolen wafer points to a disposal site, but getting proof means entering a space designed to erase bodies and the paperwork attached to them.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Mira learns overlap is a deliberate manufacturing practice built on debtor scans and unwiped residue, not an accidental sanitation failure.

chapter_spine.conflict: Mira wants a simple moral case against CommonFrame, but Gabe's economic dependence on rented labor frames makes the system's harms inseparable from its utility.
chapter_spine.consequence: Mira realizes that exposing the factory without building an alternative would wound the poor first and fastest.
must_land_beats: Earn the quiet through weather, food, and sibling texture rather than using the chapter as a pause button.
Let Gabe explain his labor-body dependence in practical terms, not ideological speech.
Show Mira absorbing a larger social consequence than the one she set out to prove.
End with the novel's moral field widened rather than clarified.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Mira wants a simple moral case against CommonFrame, but Gabe's economic dependence on rented labor frames makes the system's harms inseparable from its utility.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Mira realizes that exposing the factory without building an alternative would wound the poor first and fastest.

chapter_spine.conflict: Everyone now knows enough to disagree about what saving people would actually require, while CommonFrame begins offering Mira a survivable route back inside.
chapter_spine.consequence: The central alliance fractures into competing endgames: leak, recognition, or accommodation.
must_land_beats: Give Tavi and Lin genuinely incompatible but morally serious positions.
Let Celia's offer tempt Mira materially, not just symbolically.
Keep the argument grounded in bodies, wages, and law rather than abstract ethics.
End with Mira refusing the offer but losing strategic unity.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Everyone now knows enough to disagree about what saving people would actually require, while CommonFrame begins offering Mira a survivable route back inside.
chapter_spine.state_shift: The central alliance fractures into competing endgames: leak, recognition, or accommodation.

chapter_spine.conflict: At the claims hearing, CommonFrame is ready to bury a poor renter under blame unless Mira either stays quiet or burns her own shelter to stop it.
chapter_spine.consequence: Mira loses her job, license, and institutional cover by naming overlap production in public.
must_land_beats: Make the hearing room procedural language feel like an instrument of violence.
Show exactly what is at stake for the renter being blamed.
Have Mira's testimony be specific enough to matter.
End with expulsion, not applause.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: At the claims hearing, CommonFrame is ready to bury a poor renter under blame unless Mira either stays quiet or burns her own shelter to stop it.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Mira loses her job, license, and institutional cover by naming overlap production in public.

chapter_spine.conflict: Without salary or legal cover, the Blue Hour crew must keep people repaired while turning scattered memory fragments into something durable enough to survive seizure and disbelief.
chapter_spine.consequence: The mission shifts from exposing corporate wrongdoing to building a registry of stolen selves and nonconsenting donors.
must_land_beats: Show the desk operating as work rather than montage.
Make handwritten documentation a meaningful tactical choice.
Reveal at least one living donor whose scan was reused without real consent.
End with the registry becoming the group's central artifact.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Without salary or legal cover, the Blue Hour crew must keep people repaired while turning scattered memory fragments into something durable enough to survive seizure and disbelief.
chapter_spine.state_shift: The mission shifts from exposing corporate wrongdoing to building a registry of stolen selves and nonconsenting donors.

chapter_spine.conflict: Yaret's raid hits before the clinic can relocate its clients, files, or conscious overlaps, forcing impossible triage under legal violence.
chapter_spine.consequence: Blue Hour is destroyed, Gabe is badly re-injured, and the group loses both infrastructure and the illusion that secrecy can still protect them.
must_land_beats: Make the raid materially confusing and bodily costly, not cinematic clean.
Let Jo, Tavi, Gabe, and Lin each make a choice that reveals character under pressure.
Show what evidence is destroyed and why.
End with displacement and debt, not tactical victory.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Yaret's raid hits before the clinic can relocate its clients, files, or conscious overlaps, forcing impossible triage under legal violence.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Blue Hour is destroyed, Gabe is badly re-injured, and the group loses both infrastructure and the illusion that secrecy can still protect them.

chapter_spine.conflict: In the aftermath of the raid, grief, guilt, pain, and exhaustion threaten to turn the group inward just when visibility is becoming unavoidable.
chapter_spine.consequence: Lin chooses public testimony, and Mira and Tavi stop treating secrecy as their primary form of care.
must_land_beats: Use hospital and rubble spaces to show residue of violence without melodrama.
Force Mira and Tavi to name the shape of Tavi's complicity plainly.
Make Lin's choice to testify feel brave, frightening, and self-authoring.
End with a public course of action no one can safely undo.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: In the aftermath of the raid, grief, guilt, pain, and exhaustion threaten to turn the group inward just when visibility is becoming unavoidable.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Lin chooses public testimony, and Mira and Tavi stop treating secrecy as their primary form of care.

chapter_spine.conflict: The tribunal can freeze a factory but still refuse personhood, and CommonFrame's lawyers will reduce Lin to faulty inventory unless the testimony becomes undeniable.
chapter_spine.consequence: Overlap bodies enter the public record as deliberate creations with living claims on them, even though the law stops short of recognizing full personhood.
must_land_beats: Use Celia's late defection to complicate rather than absolve her.
Make registry evidence and testimony work together instead of one replacing the other.
Let Lin's testimony be embodied and specific, not sloganized.
End with a partial institutional victory that creates new problems.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The tribunal can freeze a factory but still refuse personhood, and CommonFrame's lawyers will reduce Lin to faulty inventory unless the testimony becomes undeniable.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Overlap bodies enter the public record as deliberate creations with living claims on them, even though the law stops short of recognizing full personhood.

chapter_spine.conflict: CommonFrame's bankruptcy turns victory into a mass-care crisis by abandoning the bargain bodies already in circulation with no maintenance path and no legal clarity.
chapter_spine.consequence: The struggle shifts from proving wrongdoing to keeping living overlap bodies and poor renters alive through system failure.
must_land_beats: Show why a legal win can produce immediate material disaster.
Transform the old ferry terminal into an emergency triage site through collective action.
Bring Celia into the new order as a displaced technician of the old one.
End with Mira choosing care over a cleaner public narrative.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: CommonFrame's bankruptcy turns victory into a mass-care crisis by abandoning the bargain bodies already in circulation with no maintenance path and no legal clarity.
chapter_spine.state_shift: The struggle shifts from proving wrongdoing to keeping living overlap bodies and poor renters alive through system failure.

chapter_spine.conflict: The cooperative has achieved survivable routine, but the broader system has not been solved and new overlap bodies keep appearing from elsewhere.
chapter_spine.consequence: Mira accepts stewardship, not resolution: the city now has a return address for the unreturnable, and the work will outlast the scandal.
must_land_beats: Let the ferry terminal cooperative feel materially lived-in rather than epilogue-generic.
Show how Mira and Tavi's intimacy survives without pretending history vanished.
Give Lin forward motion beyond being evidence for Mira's arc.
End with a new case that reopens the world's scale without flattening the earned local victory.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The cooperative has achieved survivable routine, but the broader system has not been solved and new overlap bodies keep appearing from elsewhere.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Mira accepts stewardship, not resolution: the city now has a return address for the unreturnable, and the work will outlast the scandal.

character_state_table.private_register: Sharper, more bodily, and more darkly amused; tenderness appears by surprise and usually after she has tried to hide it.
character_state_table.public_register: Dry, exact, and faintly apologetic in customer-facing situations; she speaks like someone trained to make ugly facts sound processable.
character_state_table.stress_tells: Under stress she becomes more exact, more curt, and more likely to answer with a practical detail that sidesteps vulnerability before circling back to the feeling underneath.

character_state_table.private_register: Earnest, guilty, and unexpectedly reverent about bodies, labor, and repair once he stops performing ease.
character_state_table.public_register: Loose, funny technician patter that makes expertise sound accidental and keeps other people from noticing how carefully he is watching them.
character_state_table.stress_tells: When cornered he speeds up, gets more technically specific, and uses humor as a delaying tactic until a blunt admission finally breaks through.

character_state_table.private_register: Capable of sudden lyric sensory recall followed by startlingly direct statements of need; vulnerability and wit often arrive in the same breath.
character_state_table.public_register: Careful, observant, and slightly over-attentive at first, as if each phrase is being field-tested for belonging.
character_state_table.stress_tells: Stress can make Lin go preternaturally still, repeat a sensory detail to anchor themselves, or ask a disarming literal question that bypasses everyone else's evasions.

character_state_table.private_register: Tired, class-conscious, and harder-edged; she becomes plainer when she stops pretending procedure and desire are separate things.
character_state_table.public_register: Immaculate corporate calm with enough courtesy to sound humane while still directing the room toward the outcome she wants.
character_state_table.stress_tells: When pressure gets personal she narrows options verbally, becomes more materially specific about money and housing, and lets impatience flash through the polish.

character_state_table.private_register: More ashamed, observant, and hungry for dignity than he wants anyone to know; he hates sounding needy and often talks around pain first.
character_state_table.public_register: Joking younger-brother swagger, lightly self-mocking and socially agile because charm still buys him room he cannot physically force.
character_state_table.stress_tells: He dodges concern with jokes, overstates how fine he is, and then lets one precise complaint or request slip out when the act can no longer hold.

character_state_table.private_register: Nearly the same, but with more fatigue, more accounting, and flashes of ferocious protectiveness that she does not sentimentalize.
character_state_table.public_register: Neighborly command voice: warm, bossy, efficient, and impossible to mistake for neutral.
character_state_table.stress_tells: Under stress she gets funnier and more commanding, treating panic like a mess to be sorted before emotion is allowed.

character_state_table.private_register: Colder and more legalistic; he rarely sounds angry, which is part of how he keeps control.
character_state_table.public_register: Soft, careful, and formally courteous in a way that makes resistance feel juvenile or futile.
character_state_table.stress_tells: His speech gets even cleaner under pressure; when frustrated, he strips away pleasantries rather than raising volume.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the norm in spoken English here; uncontracted forms are reserved for legal testimony, managerial performance, deliberate emphasis, or characters whose formality is itself a tactic.

premise: In a city where the rich lease custom-grown bodies for weekends, a claims adjuster for a discount body printer spends her days matching dents, fluids, and borrowed memories to the right customers. When bargain models start coming back with sex lives, childhoods, and injuries that belong to no one on file, she opens a black-market repair desk for the poor and learns the factory is building people out of overlap.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate inspection-room procedural chapters with crowded comic clinic scenes, quiet domestic intervals, erotic pressure, warehouse horror, and civic hearing sequences; consecutive chapters should differ in scene density, dialogue load, and emotional temperature so the book keeps changing how it moves.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, urban, bodily, and unsentimental; technical vocabulary is welcome when embedded in action and cost, not as decorative futurism.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third-person close anchored to Mira Alves; the narration can infer social systems through what she notices, but it should not become omniscient exposition.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate crisp claim-note precision with longer, salt-wet, bodily sentences when feeling, memory, or city pressure breaches Mira's control.

theme_spine: Maintain narrative consequence and causal storytelling over tidy resolution.
